title: Checkout failures due to payment timeout
summary: Customers could not complete checkout for 53 minutes.

title: Search latency spike in production
summary: P95 search latency increased above 2s for web users.

title: Notification delivery backlog
summary: Email and SMS notifications delayed during traffic burst.

title: Payment service outage affecting order placement
summary: Payment API downtime caused checkout failures and degraded order flow.

title: Analytics and reporting latency increase
summary: Analytics pipeline slowdown impacted reporting freshness and dashboard load times.
